metadata.description: A curated collection of specialized AI prompts, designed to enhance productivity and automate common tasks through intelligent conversation interfaces.

plugins.name: analyst
plugins.description: Analysts are a collection of agents that help you write requirements specifications and generate solution designs.

plugins.name: developer
plugins.description: Developers are a collection of skills that help you maintain and improve code quality.

plugins.name: dotnet-developer
plugins.description: DotNet Developers are a collection of agents that help you generate and maintain unit tests for .NET applications.

plugins.name: git-manager
plugins.description: Git Managers are a collection of skills that help you manage Git repositories.

plugins.name: leader
plugins.description: Leaders are a collection of agents that help you create compelling presentations and communicate ideas effectively.

plugins.name: ai-engineer
plugins.description: AI Engineer is a collection of skills that help you create and optimize VS Code agents, skills, hooks, and plugins.

plugins.name: php-developer
plugins.description: PHP Developers are a collection of agents that help you generate and maintain unit tests for PHP applications.

plugins.name: software-evaluator
plugins.description: Software Evaluators are a collection of agents that help you evaluate cloud-native applications and software procurement decisions.

plugins.name: technical-writer
plugins.description: Technical Writers are a collection of agents that help you create how-to documents, quick reference guides, user guides, and document reviews.

plugins.name: tester
plugins.description: Testers are a collection of agents that help you generate comprehensive test cases for your applications.

plugins.name: python-developer
plugins.description: Python Developer is a plugin that enforces code quality by running black and pylint automatically after every Python file modification.

plugins.name: current-date-injector
plugins.description: Injects the current date (YYYY-MM-DD) and time (HH:mm:ss) into the agent context at the start of every session so agents always know today's date and time without being told.

plugins.name: browser-path-provider
plugins.description: Provides the absolute path of the Google Chrome browser installation, or notifies the user if Chrome is not installed.

plugins.name: markdown-viewer
plugins.description: Installs markdown-viewer-app via pip and provides a skill to view markdown files in a browser using the mdview command.

plugins.name: meeting-note-taker
plugins.description: Guides you through structured meeting note capture and produces a formatted summary with optional Q&A, actions, and Mermaid diagrams saved to a configurable directory.

plugins.name: python-user
plugins.description: Python User is a plugin that injects DEFAULT_PYTHON_VERSION into the agent context at session start, checks whether Python is installed and offers to install it via the python-installer skill, and provides a skill to download and install Python from the official FTP server.

plugins.name: poetry-user
plugins.description: Poetry User is a plugin that detects whether the current workspace uses Poetry (via poetry.lock), injects context instructing the agent to prefer poetry commands, and automatically installs Poetry via pip if it is not already installed.

plugins.name: learner
plugins.description: Learner is a collection of agents that help you capture and organise personal study notes by topic in structured Markdown files.

plugins.name: code-reviewer
plugins.description: Code Reviewer is a collection of agents for performing comprehensive, evidence-based code quality reviews across multiple programming languages and frameworks.
